nbaNews.title: NBA playoff watch: What's at stake on the final day
nbaNews.summary: We break down every seeding possibility, plus a look at the race to secure the best odds for the No. 1 pick.

nbaNews.title: Playoff intel: Early buzz on Lakers, Celtics, Cavs, Pistons, Spurs, Warriors
nbaNews.summary: Are the Lakers toast? Is the Spurs' 3-point prowess real? We canvass the league on six key storylines.

nbaNews.title: Sources: Kings to retain Christie for next season
nbaNews.summary: The Kings are retaining coach Doug Christie for next season, team sources told ESPN.

nbaNews.title: Lakers fill out backcourt with new Smith deal
nbaNews.summary: With Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves sidelined by injury, the Lakers are signing two-way guard Nick Smith Jr. to a new two-year contract, his agent told ESPN.

nbaNews.title: Nuggets sit several players; Jokic questionable
nbaNews.summary: The Nuggets are resting the majority of their rotation vs. the Spurs on Sunday, and three-time MVP Nikola Jokic is listed as questionable.

nbaNews.title: Wembanyama checks another 'box,' hits 65 games
nbaNews.summary: Victor Wembanyama reached the 65-game threshold for awards eligibility with a 40-point outing that included 13 rebounds in a 139-120 win over the Mavericks.
